name: fizz-wallet
description: Fizz — dark-mode Aztec network browser-extension wallet. Private + public balances, in-browser PXE, passkey or mnemonic unlock.

scripts.verify: yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn typecheck && yarn test && yarn build
scripts.package: yarn verify && cd dist && zip -rq ../aztec-wallet-$npm_package_version.zip . && cd .. && echo "Packaged: aztec-wallet-$npm_package_version.zip"
scripts.package:store: yarn verify && node scripts/strip-manifest-key.mjs && cd dist && zip -rq ../fizz-webstore-$npm_package_version.zip . && cd .. && echo "Packaged for the Web Store (no key): fizz-webstore-$npm_package_version.zip"
